headline: Wells Fargo Lowers its Price Target on Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS) to $212 and Maintains an Equal Weight Rating
summary: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) is among the 11 Cheap Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 2, 2026, Wells Fargo lowered the price target on Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) to $212 from $235 previously and maintained an Equal Weight rating. Wells Fargo said Q4 results were weak, primarily due to the Acute […]
